Asset Name: High-performance power from anywhere.
Asset Summary: Explains how HP Z Remote Access Solution with HP Anyware and racked HP Z workstations gives power users secured, high-performance remote access to data, apps, and AI workloads from any device, overcoming VDI and cloud limits while simplifying IT management, security, and remote collaboration.
Audit Notes: Strong guide for ITDMs evaluating secure remote access for power users. Leverage as-is for RAD. Consider atomizing into: (1) a short explainer video (30–60 sec) or (2) an infographic on the architecture and benefits.

Asset Name: Maximize productivity with AI workstation laptops.
Asset Summary: Product-focused overview of HP ZBook mobile workstations with Intel Core Ultra processors, showing how AI-ready laptops deliver pro-grade performance, long battery life, secure hybrid work, and rich collaboration features for engineers, creatives and data teams needing workstation-class power anywhere.
Audit Notes: On-brand, AI-forward asset suited for RAD outreach to ITDMs and BDMs. Leverage as-is and consider atomizing into: (1) a blog/article on “AI workstation laptops for hybrid teams,” (2) a simple benefits-focused infographic, and (3) a short explainer video for use in social posts.

Asset Name: What is an AI workstation?
Asset Summary: Explainer for IT leaders on why power users need AI workstations instead of standard laptops or pure cloud. Defines AI workstations, contrasts mobile vs desktop options, and highlights hybrid-work flexibility, upgradeable performance, ISV certification, AI-optimized processors, and hardware-enforced security to protect sensitive IP while scaling AI workloads.
Audit Notes: Recent, on-brand explainer giving ITDMs a clear definition of AI workstations and guidance on performance, AI readiness, and security. Leverage as-is for awareness. Also good source for a blog/article or an atomized infographic.

Asset Name: The essential AI checklist: Future-proof your workforce in six simple steps
Asset Summary: One-page checklist that walks IT leaders through six steps to prepare their workforce for AI, from assessing the device fleet and support model to understanding personas, skills gaps, and high-performance needs, while highlighting the role of NPU-equipped Intel® Core™ Ultra-based HP AI PCs, security, and services.
Audit Notes: Clear, on-brand awareness asset that frames AI PC decisions around workforce readiness and IT support. Leverage as-is for RAD. Consider atomizing into prescriptuive a blog expanding the six steps or multiple short animation to be leveraged for social media posts.

Asset Name: Creating a sense of belonging at work
Asset Summary: Article based on the HP Work Relationship Index outlining why belonging and connection drive productivity, innovation, and resilience. Explores foundations of a connected workplace, best practices for inclusive culture and employee resource groups, and how AI and collaboration technology can support more human-centered hybrid work.
Audit Notes: Timely, on-brand thought leadership for BDMs on belonging, hybrid work, and AI. Opportunity to atomize into a blog summary or an infographic using WRI stats that links culture, AI tools, and HP hybrid work solutions. Since this asset is based on the 2024 findings of the WRI report, there is an opportunity to upcycle as per the latest findings of the WRI Report in 2025.

Asset Name: Workplace boundaries
Asset Summary: Explores why workplace boundaries are critical in hybrid work models, using WRI data to show declining worker well-being and rising demand for personalization. Outlines cultural, policy, and technology strategies (such as right-to-disconnect trends and smarter collaboration tools) to support healthier, more productive work environments.
Audit Notes: Strong WRI-backed POV for BDMs on culture, policy, and tech shifts needed for sustainable hybrid work. Atomize into a blog summarizing key stats or an infographic / one pager on boundary practices. Since this asset is based on the 2024 findings of the WRI report, there is an opportunity to upcycle as per the latest findings of the WRI Report in 2025.

Asset Name: Making the most of your workplace
Asset Summary: Thought leadership piece showing how human-centered workplace design boosts wellbeing, focus, emotional health, and productivity. Uses WRI data to highlight worker preferences for distraction-free spaces and flexible, personalized environments, and outlines physical, mental, emotional, and personal-fulfillment dimensions of effective workplace design.
Audit Notes: Solid, on-brand WRI-based POV for BDMs on workplace design and wellbeing. Atomize into a blog summarizing the four wellbeing dimensions and/or an infographic/one pager using WRI stats. Since this asset is based on the 2024 findings of the WRI report, there is an opportunity to upcycle as per the latest findings of the WRI Report in 2025.

Asset Name: Mastering IT in an era of transformation
Asset Summary: An ebook for IT leaders navigating economic pressure, hybrid work, cloud complexity, and rising security risks. Covers how AI PCs, predictive analytics, cloud ecosystems, and Zero-Trust security enable modernization, streamline operations, reduce friction, and strengthen resilience amid constant transformation.
Audit Notes: Strong mid-funnel ITDM asset on AI modernization, cloud strategy, and security resilience. Leverage as-is for RAD, and consider aromizing into a derivative an infographic on key challenges/opportunities.

Asset Name: Transforming IT for the future of work
Asset Summary: An ebook detailing how hybrid and work-from-anywhere models strain IT with unpredictable needs, risks, and processes. Highlights how managed services, cloud-based analytics, automated ticketing, AI-driven security, and multi-layer endpoint protection help IT scale support, reduce burnout, and maintain resilience across distributed environments.
Audit Notes: Strong, concise ITDM asset on WFA challenges, managed services, device security, and automation. Leverage for RAD. Consider atomizing into an infographic summarizing IT pain points and HP services.

Asset Name: IT's moment to lead the future of work.
Asset Summary: HP Next Gen AI PC focused infographic showing how outdated tools hinder innovation and how HP AI PCs help IT lead transformation. Highlights AI-driven productivity gains, analytics, collaboration tools, Zero-Trust security, and workforce experience insights that enable IT to shift from support to strategic growth leadership.
Audit Notes: Strong, high-level ITDM awareness asset linking AI PCs to modern productivity, collaboration, and security. Leverage as-is for RAD.

Asset Name: Bridging the divide: Aligning IT strategy with business execution.
Asset Summary: Thought leadership asset showing how IT can shift from reactive support to strategic business partner. Highlights alignment challenges, tech debt, and the need for integrated platforms, predictive analytics, zero-touch deployment, and collaboration tools that drive measurable business performance and employee outcomes.
Audit Notes: Strong, succinct ITDM-focused narrative on IT–business alignment, powered by WXP, automation, and collaboration solutions. Leverage as is for RAD.

Asset Name: Future-proof your IT for anywhere work.
Asset Summary: Thought leadership asset outlining how IT can adapt to rising expectations, hybrid complexity, and cloud-driven change. Covers modernization barriers, managed services adoption, outsourcing benefits, and HP solutions for automation, predictive support, secure digital workspaces, and expert advisory to build resilient, scalable IT.
Audit Notes: Strong awareness-level ITDM infographic on cloud value, managed services, and anywhere-work readiness. Leverage as-is for RAD.

Asset Name: Redefining resilience for the future of work.
Asset Summary: Security-focused asset outlining rising cyber risks amid AI adoption and hybrid work. Shows how HP AI PCs, Wolf Security, threat containment, remote lock/erase, and hardware-enforced isolation help IT establish Zero-Trust resilience while maintaining productivity across distributed teams.
Audit Notes: Strong ITDM awareness piece linking AI risk, ransomware surge hybrid endpoints, and HP’s Zero-Trust stack. Leverage as-is for RAD.

Asset Name: HP Workforce Experience Landing Page
Asset Summary: The WXP landing page presents the platform as a cloud-native, OS-agnostic AI-powered DEX and fleet management solution, offering modules for fleet management, device & print management, collaboration, digital workspaces, endpoint security, and employee engagement, helping IT teams shift from infrastructure admins to strategic enablers by reducing digital friction, lowering costs, improving employee productivity, and enhancing security across hybrid work environments.
Audit Notes: This landing page is a high-value, high-visibility entry point for ITDMs (and BDMs as a secondary audience) evaluating DEX/fleet-management solutions. Recommend capturing key sections (feature list, ROI calculator, modules) into a static downloadable solution brief (PDF) and a short “WXP-at-a-glance” infographic.

Asset Name: The race is won before it even starts | HP Workforce Experience Platform
Asset Summary: Short brand video using Scuderia Ferrari HP as an analogy for proactive performance. Shows how advanced analytics prevent issues before they impact drivers, mirroring how WXP removes digital friction, turns employee feedback into action, and improves digital employee experience by anticipating problems before they slow teams down.
Audit Notes: Strong emotional/brand-level awareness asset positioning WXP as proactive and performance-driven. Leverage for RAD. Opportunity to atomize into a one-pager case-study style summary and/or pair it with paid/organic social media efforts.

Asset Name: HP IT delivers a great employee experience by leveraging the HP Workforce Experience Platform
Asset Summary: Testimonial-driven video showing how HP’s IT team uses WXP, AI-enabled devices, and collaboration tech to deliver a human-centric digital employee experience. Highlights real-time telemetry, proactive issue resolution, data-driven decisions, 70% NPS improvement, 100% meeting room satisfaction, and significant productivity gains across the fleet.
Audit Notes: Strong real-world proof point for ITDMs showing measurable WXP impact (70% NPS lift, 100% room satisfaction). Leverage for RAD. Also an opportunity to atomize into a case-study one-pager, or a short infographic with the performance metrics.

Asset Name: Unleash the full power of your workforce with advanced IT fleet management
Asset Summary: Three-page solution brief detailing how WXP centralizes multi-vendor, multi-OS fleet management. Describes benefits including real-time visibility, proactive issue prevention, anomaly detection, asset utilization insights, risk mitigation, security coverage, cost reduction, and data-driven planning to improve workforce productivity and IT efficiency.
Audit Notes: Clear, concise mid-funnel asset for ITDMs evaluating fleet management and DEX tooling. Leverage as-is for RAD.

Asset Name: HP Workforce Experience Platform: Maximize employee productivity, minimize IT costs.
Asset Summary: A deep technical and business ebook outlining how WXP centralizes telemetry, reduces digital friction, improves employee satisfaction, and optimizes endpoints across multi-OS fleets. Covers ROI modeling, device health monitoring, proactive remediation, security compliance, software optimization, add-on modules, integrations, and managed services that extend IT capacity.
Audit Notes: Comprehensive WXP ebook ideal for mid- to late-stage ITDM evaluation. Strong detail on ROI, fleet health, remediation, and integrations. Leverage as-is. Consider atomizing into a one-pager or a derivative infographic for WXP overview.

Asset Name: Fixing problems before they're your problem: HP Workforce Experience Platform
Asset Summary: A short, no-voiceover sizzle showing how WXP reduces IT escalations, uses AI to drive ROI, and converts billions of data points into real-time insights. Emphasizes proactive issue resolution, better collaboration, and global 24/7 management so IT teams can focus on strategy instead of disruption.
Audit Notes: Strong top-funnel ITDM sizzle framing WXP as proactive, AI-powered, and experience-driven. Leverage for RAD. Opportunity to also pair with organic / paid social media efforts on social channels (i.e., LinkedIn, Facebook, X).

Asset Name: HP Workforce Experience Platform Transforms Scuderia Ferrari’s Pursuit of Operational Excellence
Asset Summary: Short testimonial-style video highlighting how Scuderia Ferrari relies on real-time data, remote engineering tools, and collaborative workflows to enhance performance. Shows how HP’s Workforce Experience Platform improves user experience, boosts management efficiency, reduces complexity, and strengthens collaboration across departments to drive operational excellence.
Audit Notes: Video links elite motorsport operations to WXP’s value pillars: management efficiency, simplified complexity, collaboration, and user experience. Leverage as-is for RAD, but also consider an opportunity to atomize into a one-pager case-study style summary and/or pair it with paid/organic social media efforts.

Asset Name: HP Workforce Experience Platform: Windows 11 Readiness
Asset Summary: A demo walkthrough showing how WXP provides fleet-wide Windows 11 readiness intelligence. Highlights dashboards for compatibility, performance risks, outdated devices, required upgrades, and component-level issues such as warranty status, memory usage, disk capacity, and BSOD history, enabling IT to plan smooth migrations using AI-driven insights.
Audit Notes: High-value demo for ITDMs evaluating W11 migration readiness tools within WXP. Leverage as-is for RAD.

Asset Name: HP Workforce Experience Platform: Collaboration Insights
Asset Summary: A demo video showing how WXP provides real-time visibility into collaboration health across UC platforms, devices, networks, and meeting rooms. Highlights experience scoring, meeting quality analytics, network issue detection, packet loss diagnostics, call-level insights, trend reporting, and automated analytics for ROI and IT planning.
Audit Notes: Strong demo for ITDMs evaluating UC performance analytics. Leverage as-is for RAD.

Asset Name: HP Workforce Experience Platform: Employee Engagement
Asset Summary: A focused demo showing how WXP enables IT leaders to measure employee sentiment after remediation actions. Highlights deploying new pulses, segmenting audiences, analyzing star ratings, tracking issue movement, and using AI to summarize thousands of free-text comments, demonstrating how IT validates impact and improves digital employee experience.
Audit Notes: Valuable demo for ITDMs evaluating WXP’s engagement and feedback loops. Leverage as-is for RAD.

Asset Name: HP Workforce Experience Platform: Fleet Management
Asset Summary: A demo showing how IT leaders use WXP to monitor fleet-wide experience scores, sentiment trends, OS and system health, and application performance. Demonstrates AI-powered analysis of survey feedback, crash diagnostics, and automated remediation scripts, enabling IT to resolve collaboration and software issues proactively across thousands of devices.
Audit Notes: High-value demo for ITDMs evaluating WXP’s fleet intelligence and automated remediation. Leverage as-is for RAD.

Asset Name: HP Workforce Experience Platform: Full Platform Demo
Asset Summary: A full walkthrough of WXP showing how IT leaders monitor experience scores, sentiment, OS health, and application performance. Demonstrates AI-powered analysis of thousands of user comments, root-cause crash diagnostics, automated remediation scripts, and post-fix sentiment pulses that validate impact, improving fleet health and employee experience over time.
Audit Notes: Highly comprehensive demo covering end-to-end WXP workflows (i.e., sentiment, diagnostics, remediation, and impact validation). Leverage as-is for RAD.

Asset Name: Deloitte and AI4Animals
Asset Summary: Case study on how Deloitte Netherlands uses HP Z Workstations and Solutions to power AI4Animals, a computer-vision system that monitors animal handling in slaughterhouses. High-performance compute speeds model training and detection accuracy, making rollout faster and more cost effective across 20+ European sites while advancing animal welfare and regulatory compliance.
Audit Notes: Compelling AI workload proof point for ITDMs weighing HP Z for compute-intensive computer-vision projects. Leverage for RAD. Atomize into a blog on AI workstations for real-world AI, a metrics infographic, and a short social video built around the AI4Animals story.

Asset Name: Empower your workforce to embrace AI and be a force for growth
Asset Summary: One-page guide drawing on the 2024 HP Work Relationship Index to unpack why AI adoption stalls at work and how leaders can change it. Covers two core obstacles, time pressure and job-security fears, then offers practical ways to reframe AI as a personal productivity ally that creates time and increases worker value.
Audit Notes: Useful BDM awareness piece linking AI adoption to workforce growth and Windows 11 Pro. Built on 2024 WRI data, so upcycle against the 2025 WRI findings before reuse. Atomize into a short blog and a stat-led infographic on the obstacles and fixes.

Asset Name: From Legacy to Leading Edge
Asset Summary: Stat-driven infographic on why giving workers the right technology drives productivity, satisfaction, and growth. Uses HP Work Relationship Index data to show that most workers lack confidence in their employer’s tech choices, value personalization, and see AI as a competitive advantage, with trust and leadership framed as the high-engagement, high-profit formula.
Audit Notes: Punchy BDM awareness asset on tools, personalization, and AI. Built on 2024 WRI data, so upcycle with 2025 WRI figures before reuse. Atomize into a blog expanding the trust-and-tech theme and a set of social statics for LinkedIn.

Asset Name: The Future of Work is being reshaped by young generations
Asset Summary: Infographic on how younger generations are reshaping work, drawing on 2025 Work Relationship Index and World Economic Forum data. Shows Gen Z reaching 27% of the global workforce by the end of 2025, their distinct priorities, AI fluency, and side-venture rates, and what their expectations mean for how organizations attract and support emerging talent.
Audit Notes: Fresh 2025-data BDM awareness piece on the generational shift and AI fluency. Leverage as-is for RAD. Atomize into a blog on preparing for a Gen Z workforce and a LinkedIn carousel built from the generational stats.

Asset Name: 2025 Work Relationship Index
Asset Summary: Headline infographic for the 2025 Work Relationship Index, showing the global workforce under pressure. Reports that only 20% of knowledge workers have a healthy relationship with work in 2025, down from 28% in 2024, with 41% now in the Critical Zone, and notes that businesses can influence 85% of the factors measured.
Audit Notes: High-value 2025-data awareness asset and the natural refresh source for older WRI pieces in the library. Leverage as-is for RAD. Atomize into a blog on the year-over-year decline and a stat infographic, and use it to upcycle 2024-based WRI assets.

Asset Name: HP IT Elevates Employee Experience and Engagement
Asset Summary: Case study on how HP’s own IT team uses the HP Workforce Experience Platform to move beyond device management toward a human-centric employee experience. Features CIO and Chief Data Officer perspectives on AI-driven personalization, telemetry, and analytics, with a goal of giving employees back 10% of their time and putting wellbeing at the center of growth.
Audit Notes: Credible HP-on-HP proof point for ITDMs evaluating WXP. Leverage for RAD. Atomize into a case-study one-pager, a metrics infographic around the 10% time-back goal, and a short social video pairing the CIO quotes with WXP outcomes.

Asset Name: HP redefines PC refresh approach using performance data
Asset Summary: Case study on how HP IT replaced age-based PC refresh with a data-driven model, using Workforce Experience Platform telemetry, employee sentiment, and fleet performance analytics to rank devices and prioritize the users most affected. The approach targets refreshes where they improve productivity most, extending device life where performance holds and optimizing hardware investment.
Audit Notes: Strong ITDM proof point for WXP-led, telemetry-driven refresh planning. Leverage for RAD. Atomize into a blog on data-driven refresh strategy, a before-and-after infographic, and a one-pager for IT asset and procurement teams.

Asset Name: Maximize Employee Productivity, Minimize IT costs
Asset Summary: Solution brief positioning the HP Workforce Experience Platform as an AI-powered way to shift IT from cost center to business accelerator. Covers full visibility across PCs, Macs, printers, and video endpoints, proactive issue resolution, employee sentiment analysis, and the option to layer HP professional and managed services for organizations that want expert support.
Audit Notes: Concise WXP overview for mid-funnel ITDM evaluation and a strong condensed companion to the full WXP ebook already in the library. Leverage as-is for RAD. Atomize into a WXP-at-a-glance infographic and a short explainer video.

Asset Name: Embrace flexible remote access that's fully data security compliant.
Asset Summary: Finance-focused solution brief on HP Anyware for secure remote access to high-performance virtual workstations. Shows how traders and the third-party providers who support them gain low-latency responsiveness and full data-security compliance through centralized computing and Zero or Thin Client endpoints, protecting intellectual property and private client data while reducing trading-floor installation and downtime costs.
Audit Notes: Targeted ITDM brief for financial-services remote access and IP protection. Leverage as-is for RAD. Atomize into a finance-sector blog on secure trading-floor access and an infographic on the security and latency benefits.

Asset Name: Rapid deployment and management of hybrid, multi-cloud virtual desktops and remote workstations
Asset Summary: Solution brief on the enhanced HP Anyware and its Anyware Manager Enterprise control plane, a multi-tenant SaaS layer for deploying and scaling secure remote access. Highlights rapid, flexible deployments across devices and networks, a Zero Trust security model with VPN-less gateways, and a reduced IT footprint for government, media, finance, education, and design workforces.
Audit Notes: Clear ITDM brief on HP Anyware deployment, scale, and Zero Trust security. Leverage as-is for RAD. Atomize into a blog on simplifying VDI at scale and an infographic on the SaaS-first management model.

Asset Name: Strengthen security for government environments.
Asset Summary: Military and government solution brief on HP Anyware, delivering ultra-secure PCoIP access through lightweight endpoints and high-performance virtual workstations. Explains how federal, state, and local agencies and their contractors gain flexibility, responsiveness, and cost efficiency while staying security-compliant, with Zero Clients reducing IT workload, simplifying onboarding, and easing disaster recovery.
Audit Notes: Strong public-sector ITDM brief on secure remote access. Leverage as-is for RAD. Atomize into a government-sector blog on compliant remote work and an infographic on the PCoIP and Zero Client security benefits.

Asset Name: WWT's Customers Accomplish Business Outcomes with HP Anyware-Enabled Tech Infrastructure
Asset Summary: Case study on how World Wide Technology builds HP Anyware into the technology stacks it delivers to public and private sector customers. Describes secure, plug-and-play remote solutions and mobile field kits for government, military, and commercial demonstrations, using Zero and Thin Clients over PCoIP to provide flexible, cost-effective, high-performance access from host to endpoint.
Audit Notes: Useful channel and public-sector proof point for HP Anyware in real deployments. Leverage for RAD. Atomize into a case-study one-pager and a short social video on secure remote infrastructure for government and commercial use.

Asset Name: Elevate print and document experiences with a transformational, modern solution
Asset Summary: Solution brief on HP Managed Print Services as a modern, end-to-end answer to hybrid-work print challenges. Covers secure tailored workflows, AI-driven proactive fleet management, and intelligence from the Workforce Experience Platform, with predictable payment models to control spend. Notes that 89% of organizations see MPS as important to their digital transformation efforts.
Audit Notes: Strong mid-funnel ITDM brief tying MPS to security, sustainability, and digital transformation. Leverage as-is for RAD. Atomize into a blog on modern print management for hybrid work and an infographic on the MPS value pillars.

Asset Name: Houston Healthcare modernizes the print environment
Asset Summary: Case study on how Houston Healthcare, a Georgia provider serving 300,000 patients a year across 15 locations, modernized printing with HP Managed Print Services. Shows simpler, more reliable, secure print workflows that integrate with EHR platforms and support patient care, with print cost efficiency up 5%, improved uptime, and sustainable toner recycling handled by HP.
Audit Notes: Solid healthcare-sector ITDM proof point for MPS. Leverage for RAD. Atomize into a healthcare case-study one-pager and an infographic on the cost, uptime, and security outcomes.

Asset Name: U.S. Bank optimizes printing to reduce paper waste and increase recycling with HP
Asset Summary: Case study on how U.S. Bank used HP Managed Print Services and HP Secure Print to refresh an aging fleet and advance sustainability goals. Reports 34.6 million sheets of paper waste avoided, 153,000 pounds of printers securely recycled, 6 million pages prevented from printing, a projected 73% energy cost saving over 12 months, and 65% fewer print-related support incidents.
Audit Notes: High-impact financial-services proof point with strong sustainability and ROI metrics. Leverage for RAD. Atomize into a case-study one-pager, a sustainability-metrics infographic, and social statics built around the paper and energy savings.

Asset Name: Successful Partnership Between STERNAUTO and Ribbex GmbH
Asset Summary: Case study on how German vehicle dealership chain STERNAUTO, with 1,600 employees across 25 branches, modernized an aging 50-device printer fleet through HP partner Ribbex GmbH. Highlights fast spare-parts sourcing, efficient maintenance, and improved operational stability and security, meeting the company’s high efficiency and quality standards across its multi-brand dealership network.
Audit Notes: Useful automotive and channel-partner proof point for HP print solutions in EMEA. Leverage for RAD. Atomize into a case-study one-pager and a short partner-success social post.

Asset Name: iA Financial Group optimizes print environment
Asset Summary: Case study on how iA Financial Group, serving 4 million clients with more than 8,000 employees, optimized its print environment with HP Managed Print Services through partner Infolaser. Reports a 70% reduction in service calls, a 37% smaller copier fleet, automated toner replenishment, higher uptime, a consistent experience across offices, and measurable sustainability benefits.
Audit Notes: Strong Canadian financial-services proof point for MPS with clear operational ROI. Leverage for RAD. Atomize into a case-study one-pager and an infographic on the service-call and fleet-reduction outcomes.

Asset Name: HP LaserJet Enterprise Print Portfolio For Banking & Financial Firms
Asset Summary: Sector brochure for the HP LaserJet Enterprise Print Portfolio in banking and financial services. Positions HP as the world’s most secure printers, with Zero Trust user verification, device audit trails for Bank Secrecy Act and Sarbanes-Oxley compliance, secure mobile and remote printing, and control-panel and scan-to-Office features that speed document workflows for overloaded finance teams.
Audit Notes: Targeted financial-services ITDM brochure on secure print. Leverage as-is for RAD. Atomize into a finance blog on endpoint and print security and an infographic on the compliance and breach-cost stats.

Asset Name: HP LaserJet Enterprise Print Portfolio For Healthcare
Asset Summary: Sector brochure for the HP LaserJet Enterprise Print Portfolio in healthcare. Frames secure printing as protection for patient data, with Zero Trust user verification, audit trails for HIPAA and Sarbanes-Oxley compliance, secure mobile and remote printing, and control-panel and scan-to-Office features that reduce manual steps so care teams can spend more time with patients.
Audit Notes: Targeted healthcare ITDM brochure on secure print and compliance. Leverage as-is for RAD. Atomize into a healthcare blog on print security and an infographic on the breach-cost and burnout stats.

Asset Name: HP Managed Collaboration Services Sets Stage for Seamless Collaboration
Asset Summary: Case study on how HP uses HP Managed Collaboration Services, built with Poly products, to deliver consistent, equitable meeting experiences across hybrid work. Part of the HP on HP Program, it shows how the company simplifies room booking and video conferencing so employees never have to think about the technology, with collaboration positioned at the center of the workplace experience.
Audit Notes: Credible HP-on-HP proof point for ITDMs evaluating managed collaboration. Leverage for RAD. Atomize into a case-study one-pager, an infographic on the collaboration outcomes, and a short social video on seamless meeting experiences.

Asset Name: Boost Collaboration. Maximize ROI.
Asset Summary: Solution brief for HP Communication and Collaboration Professional Services, helping organizations define, design, and deploy collaboration environments. Positions HP’s global expertise to reduce risk, tailor solutions, conserve resources, and speed deployment, noting that only 23% of employees say their company currently provides the technology they need to work effectively.
Audit Notes: Clear ITDM brief on collaboration professional services. Leverage as-is for RAD. Atomize into a blog on getting more from collaboration investments and an infographic on the services and ROI benefits.

Asset Name: Ericsson Provides 5G Solutions to Hybrid Workforce
Asset Summary: Case study on how Ericsson, serving 130,000 users across 140 countries, secured and modernized its global hybrid workforce with HP Managed Device Services, HP Sure Admin and Sure Start BIOS protection, and 5G-enabled notebooks managed through a cloud-native approach. Reports device deployment time reduced by 400%, near 100% worldwide adoption, and cold boot times cut by an estimated 75%.
Audit Notes: Strong enterprise ITDM proof point for modern device management and endpoint security at global scale. Leverage for RAD. Atomize into a case-study one-pager, a metrics infographic, and a short social video on the deployment and boot-time gains.

Asset Name: Dr. Oetker Blends HP Services to Develop a Recipe for Success
Asset Summary: Case study on how multinational food producer Dr. Oetker, with nearly 17,000 employees across 40-plus countries, simplified IT operations using HP Device Provisioning Services, HP Proactive Insights, and Workforce Experience Platform telemetry. Standardizing a previously disparate device estate cut costs, reduced outages, improved uptime and repair processes, and lifted employee satisfaction worldwide.
Audit Notes: Solid global enterprise proof point combining HP device services and WXP telemetry. Leverage for RAD. Atomize into a case-study one-pager and an infographic on the cost, uptime, and satisfaction outcomes.

Asset Name: Grove City College blends innovation and efficiency
Asset Summary: Case study on how Grove City College standardized on HP Dragonfly PCs with a four-year HP Care Pack and Accidental Damage Protection to bring learning equity to 2,200 students. Deploying more than 800 new Dragonfly devices a year and managing print through partner NWN Carousel, the college simplified support, gained total cost of ownership benefits, and reduced IT burden as an HP qualified self-maintainer.
Audit Notes: Useful education-sector proof point for device standardization and lifecycle support. Since this case study dates to 2023, upcycle by refreshing the metrics, product references, and any dated details before reuse for RAD. Atomize into an education case-study one-pager and an infographic on the TCO and support outcomes.

Asset Name: AI PC productivity meets workstation power
Asset Summary: Square social graphic (1200x1200) for the HP ZBook AI workstation line, co-branded with the Intel Core Ultra badge and the campaign line Conquer Your Workload with Intel Core Ultra Processors. A power-user lifestyle image anchors the headline AI PC productivity meets workstation power, positioning the ZBook as the point where AI PC capability and desktop-class workstation performance meet for engineers, designers, and data scientists working away from their desks.
Audit Notes: Strong awareness-stage social unit for the AI workstation laptop push, visually and verbally aligned to the ZBook one-pager and brochure. Leverage as-is for RAD across paid and organic social (LinkedIn, Facebook). Run it as the top-of-funnel hook into the Maximize productivity one-pager, and test the productivity angle against the complex-workflows cut to see which drives more qualified traffic.

Asset Name: What one computer supercharges complex workflows?
Asset Summary: Square social graphic (1200x1200) for the HP AI workstation line, co-branded with the Intel Core Ultra badge and the line Conquer Your Workload with Intel Core Ultra Processors. A focused-professional image carries the headline What one computer supercharges complex workflows, posing the laptop versus cloud versus workstation question to power users and steering them toward the AI workstation as the answer.
Audit Notes: Useful awareness-stage social unit built on the What is an AI workstation theme, framed as a question to spark engagement. Leverage as-is for RAD across paid and organic social (LinkedIn, Facebook). Point the click-through at the What is an AI workstation explainer, and run it as a paired set with the AI PC productivity meets workstation power cut.

Asset Name: AI-enhanced. Efficient. Ready for what's next.
Asset Summary: Square digital ad (1080x1080, October 2025) from the HP and Intel BPS Alliance digital transformation campaign, co-branded with Intel Core Ultra and Intel vPro and the line That’s the power of Intel inside. A knowledge-worker image at a multi-monitor setup carries the headline AI-enhanced. Efficient. Ready for what’s next., positioning Intel vPro AI PCs as the foundation for efficient, future-ready work across the broader workforce.
Audit Notes: Broad digital transformation ad aimed at business decision makers, distinct in tone and audience from the power-user workstation cuts. Leverage as-is for RAD in paid social and display. Land the click-through on AI PC adoption or Future of Work content to match its wider audience, and run it as the BDM-facing awareness layer alongside the ITDM workstation social.

Asset Name: Performance for AI workflows
Asset Summary: Video script (October 2025) for an HP Z Workstations and Solutions promo, co-branded under the line Conquer your workload with Intel Core Ultra Processors. The script moves through tackling intensive workflows, rendering in real time, visualizing data, experiencing built-in AI, and harnessing pro-level performance, building a capability-led case for HP Z and Intel Core Ultra among power users with demanding AI workloads.
Audit Notes: Capability-led HP Z product video for ITDM consideration, the video companion to the AI workstation one-pagers and social. Leverage for RAD once produced, as the anchor of the AI workstation campaign. Atomize into short vertical social cutdowns per capability claim, a captioned silent-autoplay version for feeds, and a one-pager of the performance points.

Asset Name: Manufacturing and technology giant revolutionizes its print infrastructure with HP
Asset Summary: Case study on how a global manufacturing and technology giant replaced Xerox with HP to modernize its print infrastructure. Frustrated by Xerox's lagging momentum, the company moved to HP Managed Print Services and a print security assessment, deploying HP Security Manager, HP Advance, and JetAdvantage Workpath. HP stood up a proof-of-concept pilot in four months, the customer skipped a formal RFP, and the model now guides regional rollouts, with sustainability and carbon-neutral printing central to the partnership.
Audit Notes: Useful competitive-displacement proof point showing a manufacturer switching from Xerox to HP, strong for ITDM and procurement conversations on managed print and print security. The customer is unnamed and the story carries no hard metrics, and it dates to 2023, so upcycle by refreshing the details and adding quantified outcomes if available before reuse for RAD. Atomize into a competitive-switch blog, a one-pager on the four-month pilot, and a security-and-sustainability infographic.
